meta.title: Kalamış Tennis Club — Curated matchmaking
meta.description: Organized matches, balanced opponents, and a premium tennis community in Istanbul. Join the WhatsApp group directly.
meta.ogDescription: Curated tennis matchmaking. Balanced games. No chaos.

nav.instagramAria: Kalamış Tennis Club on Instagram (opens in a new tab)

hero.subtitle: Organized matches. Balanced opponents. No chaos.
hero.note: A curated community in Istanbul. Admins organize play; members opt in through polls — not endless group chat noise.
hero.heroSpotlightAlt: Jannik Sinner with the Monte Carlo Masters trophy — a champion moment
hero.heroPhotoCaption: Elite tennis and winning energy — passion you can feel on court.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps from interest to court — designed to stay organized.

steps.title: Poll
steps.description: We post availability and intent. You respond when you’re in — clear signal, zero noise.

steps.title: Selection
steps.description: Admins curate attendance for balanced sides. Quality over quantity — every session counts.

steps.title: Matchmaking
steps.description: Pairings are assembled for competitive, respectful play — skill-aware, not random.

steps.title: Play
steps.description: Show up on time, play hard, keep it simple. Courts and structure are handled for you.

why.title: Why Kalamış Tennis Club
why.subtitle: Built for players who want structure — without losing the soul of the game.
why.imageAlt: Doubles play on an outdoor court — Monte Carlo–style tennis atmosphere
why.imageTagline: Balanced play, clear rules, authentic tennis culture.

points.title: Balanced, skill-aware matches
points.body: Games are composed with care — closer rallies, better rhythm, less frustration.

points.title: Court reservations handled
points.body: Logistics stay behind the scenes. You focus on playing, not coordinating.

points.title: No unnecessary messaging
points.body: Communication is intentional. The group isn’t a 24/7 feed of noise.

points.title: Premium, curated experience
points.body: Membership is selective. The standard is respect, punctuality, and fair play.

rules.title: System rules
rules.subtitle: Clear expectations keep the community sharp — on court and off.
items: Participation is driven by polls — opt in when you mean it.
No-shows affect everyone. Repeated absences may result in removal.
Matches are organized by admins to keep quality and balance consistent.
Messaging is restricted to keep coordination clean and purposeful.

roadmap.title: Future features
roadmap.subtitle: We’re intentionally slow to add complexity — only what elevates play.

items.label: Near-term
items.title: Rating system
items.detail: Lightweight skill signals to improve match balance over time.

items.label: Exploring
items.title: Mini tournaments
items.detail: Short-format events for members who want a sharper competitive edge.

gallery.title: The colours and rhythm of tennis
gallery.subtitle: Greens, sky blues, and court textures — a visual slice of the club experience.

finalCta.title: Join Kalamış Tennis Club
finalCta.body: If this sounds like your kind of tennis — structured, fair, and quietly competitive — join the WhatsApp group in one step.
